header.title: Image Flipper — Flip Photos Horizontally or Vertically Online
header.description: Free online image flipper to flip photos horizontally or vertically with a single click. Mirror images for perfect reflections, reverse selfies, or create symmetrical compositions — 100% client-side, your images stay private.
header.keywords: image flipper, flip image, flip photo, mirror image, horizontal flip, vertical flip, photo flipper, mirror photo online

dropzone.clickOrDrag: Click or drag & drop your image
dropzone.fileFormats: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP · Processed locally

howToUse.title: How to Use Image Flipper
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag and drop an image or click to browse from your device.
howToUse.step2Desc: Select Horizontal, Vertical, or Both to flip on both axes at once.
howToUse.step3Desc: Choose the output format and quality for the flipped image.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click Flip Image, preview the result, then download.

items.question: What is the difference between horizontal and vertical flip?
items.answer: Horizontal flip mirrors the image left-to-right. Vertical flip mirrors it top-to-bottom.

items.question: Does flipping change image dimensions?
items.answer: No. Flipping preserves the original dimensions and resolution.

items.question: Can I flip multiple images at once?
items.answer: This tool processes one image at a time. For batch flipping, process images individually.

items.question: What formats are supported?
items.answer: We support JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, and BMP.

items.question: Is the processing done locally?
items.answer: Yes. Your image never leaves your device.

items.question: Can I flip both horizontally and vertically at once?
items.answer: Yes. Select the Both option to flip on both axes simultaneously.

examples.title: Try an Example
examples.sampleText: Flip a selfie horizontally to correct the mirror image effect.
examples.result: A correctly oriented selfie with no mirror reversal.
